4 Lineages

  •            

  • What do you mean 'Lineage'?

    You have an Archetypal Lineage...

    Everyone does... but none exactly like yours. Each Archetypal Lineage is unique.

     

    There are 4 categories of Archetypal Lineages. Probably your Archetypal Lineage fits into one of these categories, or it may have resonance with more than one category.

     

    Your Archetypal Lineage is waiting to stream down into your life, entering from up behind the top of your spine and exiting into your life actions through the place just above your heart.

     

    Your Archetypal Lineage is already ready to put useful and challenging jobs on your bench, and also to provide you with unseen resources and unimaginable coincidences and connections to handle these jobs.

     

    Your Box has probably been running like hell away from these jobs... but your Being is starving for the challenge and the adventure the jobs will bring.

     

    You could be living as the space through which your Archetypal Lineage does its work in the world. Its services would benefit your village.

     

    Your archetypal Lineage is your destiny. Your destiny is optional. You may choose to serve your destiny, or you may not. Most people do not choose it.

     

    Your Archetypal Lineage has no hands or mouth. This means it cannot do its work in the material world without you.

     

    When you have prepared yourself enough to become the space through which your Archetypal Lineage can do its work in the world your Archetypal Lineage is grateful. Having an archetypal force of nature be grateful to you is not such a bad thing. Little benefits occur. Perhaps you do not get a common cold so often. Perhaps you have clearer intuitions and better luck than most. Perhaps you find yourself being presented with extraordinary new friends and inconceivable opportunities.

     

    By the time you are reading this, it is already time to prepare yourself to jack-in to your Archetypal Lineage's astonishing resources so it can enable you to provide your valuable services.

     

    No one can prepare you for you.

    More interestingly...

    No one can stop you from preparing yourself.

  • Thoughtmap of the 4 Archetypal Lineages

  • Delivering Your Archetypal Lineage In An Archan Gameworld

    In the video below, Robert Gilman from Context.org says,

    "Why did you incarnate now? Because you wouldn't have missed this party for anything! What makes news is very different from what makes history... We have not had this much fun for 5,000 years..."

    massively-multiplayer online-and-offline personal-transformation game.

    Matrix Code: YOUTUBEx.61

     

     

     

     

     

    What Is The Connection Between Discovering How To Inner Navigate Your Conscious Feelings...

    And Being Able To Deliver The Nonmaterial Value Of Your Archetypal Lineage?

    Quote from Aung San Suukyi

  • What do you mean 'Archetypal'?

    The Archetypal terminology used in Possibility Management is NOT derived from or associated with the popular work of Carl Gustav Jung.

     

    Jung evolved his understanding of deep-psychology archetypes in reference to the psychoanalytical context that he inherited from his teacher Sigmund Freud.

     

    Instead of relying on Jung’s experiences, we started doing our own empirical research in 1975. Our experiments brought us directly into contact with the same sources that Jung must have tapped into to formulate his set of distinctions. However, instead of researching from a psychological context we researched from a possibility context. Because we went fishing with a different net, we caught a different sort of fish, although we fished in the same sea.

     

    In Possibility Management, Archetypes are potential configurations hardwired into the energetic structure of human beings. Archetypes are either responsible or irresponsible. We learned about them first hand, experientially, while exploring the Archetypal Domains during 5 Body Intimacy Journeys.

     

    Irresponsible Archetypes are awakened during childhood and used to create a workable Survival Strategy, such as Gremlin or Demon.

     

    Responsible Archetypes - for example the Stellated Feelings Archetypes - lie dormant until they are turned on through an adolescent rite of passage (which is notably missing from our culture). Much about Archetypes is explored further in practical ways in the StartOver.xyz gameworld. We have capitalized many of the archetypal words we use because they are … well … Archetypal.

  •   "We can choose to be audacious enough

    to take responsibility for the entire human family.

    We can choose to make our love for the world

    be what our lives are really about."

    - Werner Erhard, 2018 Mexico   

  • What do you mean 'Talisman'?

    An Archetypal Lineage Talisman is a particular object worn around the neck so that it hangs in the space between your heart and your throat. The Talisman serves as a reminding factor for you, and as a gateway for your Archetypal Lineage to come through into your world.

     

    Most Talismans are made of natural substances such as metal, stone, wood, bone, horn, leather, shell, or coral. An object's capacity to serve as an Archetypal Lineage Talisman depends more on its weight, shape, and lack of symbology than it does on its beauty.

     

    For those who have not yet jacked-into your Archetypal Lineage, the Talisman serves as a signal to your Archetypal Lineage that you are taking ernest and consequential steps to prepare yourself for this initiatory shift.

     

    Your Archetypal Lineage connects with your Archetypal Body (one of your 5 bodies) which extends out behind you from the top of your spine.

     

    Your Archetypal Lineage has nothing to do with what indigenous cultures may refer to as your 'ancestors'. There are no personalities or 'godheads' connected with your Archetypal Lineage because the Lineage is archetypally neutral.

     

    The Talisman is worn every day as a symbol of commitment and of the stand that you take in a life of practice. It is not worn as jewelry.

     

    Below are shown some examples of working Archetypal Lineage Talismans.

  • Examples of Archetypal Lineage Talismans

    There is a scene in the film Fight Club (which is on the Possibility Films list...) where Tyler Durden finds a young man working at a corner convenience store and forces him at gunpoint to step out back in the parking lot, fall to his knees, and give Tyler his driver's license. Then Tyler demands to know what the man really wants to be doing with his life. He says he wants to be a Veterinarian. Tyler tells the young man, “I'm keeping your license. I know where you live. I'm going to check on you. If you aren't back in school and on your way to being a veterinarian in six weeks, you will be dead. Get the hell out of here.”  

     

    Tyler returns home and hangs the newly captured driver's licence with the fifty others he is holding ransom so that people live out their Archetypal Lineage instead of being dead Zombies.

     

    Each of the photos below is an Archetypal Lineage Talismans of a real Possibilitator who isnow out there delivering the services of their Archetypal Lineage to their village.

    Most of these individuals obtained their current Talisman while participating in a Possibility Lab.

    Show more

  • 4 Lineage Traditions

    Your archetypal lineage is unique and it will have resonance with one or more of the 4 core lineage traditions:
    Earth Guardians
    Intimacy Journeyers (Village Weavers)
    Evolutionaries
    Gameworld Builders

    DOORWAY TO 4 LINEAGES WEBSITE

  • What Needs To Happen To Prepare Yourself To Jack-in To Your Archetypal Lineage

    If you actually want to prepare yourself to jack-in to your Archetypal Lineage, then the suggestion is to go to the first of the following websites, study the context, do all of the Experiments given there, record your Matrix Points after doing each Experiment, then go to the next website, study that context, do those Experiments, record those Matrix Points, continue.

    Yes. We are serious. Are you?

    One way to roll this is to commit to your Path of initiation by calendaring at least 3 Expand The Box trainings (to anchor Archan thoughtware upgrades in your world) and 10 Possibility Labs to do the Healings that escape your from the 8 Prisons, and Authentic Adulthood Initiations that unleash your inherent potentials.

  • Experiments That Help

    Prepare You To Jack-In To Your Archetypal Lineage

    No one can prepare you to jack-in to your Archetypal Lineage but you.

    If you are to be prepared, you must prepare yourself.

    Society does not care about such things as building endurance for the liquid states that occur during matrix building experiments.

    But you can.

    You are either prepared or not.

    If you are not prepared and you try to jack-in, your Archetypal Lineage may give you one or two jobs to do. When you fail to do them because your self image stories say, "I don't know how to do this," or, "I am too scared to do this," or, "I will never succeed at this," or, "I am not the right person for this," then the tube that the jobs come through onto your bench will get backed up so no more jobs can arrive.

    Then your Archetypal Lineage has to go look for someone else to do the jobs.

    You might be able to get the job...

    but, can you do the job?

    Results don't lie.

    Before hooking-in to your Archetypal Lineage it is crucial that you are bigger than your Underworld.Parallel to ongoingly building the structural elements that will allow you to do the jobs

    that your Archetypal Lineages will tell you to do,

    you will need to approach and meet the multi-dimensionality of your Archetypal Lineage.

    The following experiments are precious precise steps to come closer to your Archetypal Lineage.

    INTERVIEW 10 PEOPLE WHO HAVE JACKED-IN

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.01

    In the next week, find 10 people who are jacked-in to their Archetypal Lineage. You can tell when someone have jacked-in to their Archetypal Lineage from: they are serving something greater than themselves, their service emerges out of radical responsibility, they are stabilize in the adult ego state, they have build and are occupying Next Culture gameworlds.

     

    Contact them and arrange to interview them about how they prepared themselves to jack-in to their Archetypal Lineage. Not everyone that you will contact will be familiar with the terminology of Archetypal Lineage. It is your job to interview them anyway, finding the keys to their journey.

     

    Record the meeting. Publish them on your YouTube Channel for the benefit of all Beings looking for the path to Archetypal Service.

     

    Write down in your Beep! Book every step they took.

     

    Then you, yourself, do EVERY step, experiment, challenge that they have had to do.

     

    When you have done these things, please enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.01 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 10 Matrix Points.

    DISTILL YOUR HERO'S STEPS TO JACK-IN TO THEIR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.02

    Pick out your favorite Archetypal storybook, where you are the main character in the story.

    Read it again from the perspective that you are preparing yourself to jack-in into your Archetypal Lineage.

     

    Distill from your reading what are the experiments, challenges, adventures and encounters the character have to go through to prepare themselves to jack-in to their Archetypal Lineage.

     

    From the distillation of their preparatory steps, design your own experiments to build the matrix and resilience to liquid state to jack-in to your Archetypal Lineage.

     

    Do ALL the experiments that you have created for yourself.

     

    When you are done, please enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.02 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

    WRITE AND PUBLISH A SHORT STORY

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.03

    Create for yourself a 2 hour of undisturbed time and space for writing.

     

    Take out your notebook, or open your write software on your computer (and turn off Internet and your other apps).

     

    Go to a couch, a mattress and a yoga mat, and lay down. Do 3 minutes of high intensity Rage, comparable to 3-3-3 initiation. Let the clarity and the words of your Archetypal Lineage come out.

     

    WARNING: If you have not yet done your 3-3-3 initiation, start now with your first 3 minutes, and join a Team who is holding space for a 3-3-3.

     

    Then sit down to write. Tell your Archetypal Lineage to write a fictional or non-fictional short story (2-5 pages) about What The World Needs To Hear From Your Archetypal Lineage. This is the title of your short story.

     

    Write as your Archetypal Lineage prompts you. Turn this writing into and article and publish it on Medium or another platform, to share with the world.

     

    Then enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.03 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

    LEAVE HOME BY FOOT ON A JOURNEY OF YOUR PATH

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.04

    The experiment is this: leave home with almost nothing for an indefinite period of time and don't warn anybody in advance. When you leave, simply say, "I need to go. I have a secret mission. I will be okay."

     

    (WARNING: Do NOT allow your Gremlin to use this to scare people.)

     

    You don't know what the mission is or how long it would take. It could be 3 days, 3 weeks, 3months, 3 years. All you know is that you should bring the book Cavitation with you and read it along the way.

     

    Don't sleep at booked hotels. Let your Archetypal Lineage inform you where to turn, which train to jump on, which country/culture is next for you to discover...

     

    Hit the road like Bilbo Baggins. Go a step further beyond the place where you've ever stepped before. Get used to leaving home.

     

    NOTE: This is definitely NOT about drugs or crime.

     

    EXPERIMENT ARCHLINE.04: matrix code for the first month.

    EXPERIMENT ARCHLINE.05: matrix code for the second month.

    EXPERIMENT ARCHLINE.06: matrix code for the third month.

    EXPERIMENT ARCHLINE.07: matrix code for the fourth month.

    EXPERIMENT ARCHLINE.08: matrix code for the fifth month.

     

    As the months go by, enter Matrix Codes above in your free account at StartOver.xyz. Each month of travel is worth 5 Matrix Points.

    DO SOMETHING THAT FREAKS YOUR BOX OUT

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.09

    This week, find ONE BIG thing that freaks your Box out and do it.

    Don't get arrested. And no blood. This is not an adrenaline booster experiment.

     

    Go talk to a beautiful woman in a café, unless you are a White Widow and it is part of your survival strategy.

    Buy taps (shoes) and perform in the middle of the town square on a miniature wooden dance stage.

    Audition to be an actor in a play.

    Walk one day in a Pirate or Wizard/Sorceress outfit.

    NOTE: This is definitely NOT about drugs or crime.

     

    One Possibilitator reports: "One time I had a 2-hour layover in Paris Gare du Nord, late in the evening. I went outside and there were sex shops. I'd never been in a sex shop in my life. I decided to do the experiment of freaking my Box out. I went into a shop and started picking up sex paraphernalia. My Box was completely freaking out. I even bought something. I don't think I showed it to anybody or used for anything it except to prove to myself that I could do things that freak my Box out."

     

    Then enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.09 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    WATCH 10 ARCHETYPAL MOVIES FROM THE POSSIBILITY FILMS LIST

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.10

    Invite people over for a Watch Archetypal Movies Party. You can do this once or twice a month. Do not tell people which movie you are watching. It is a tradition to avoid people letting their Box choose which movies they will watch.

     

    The experiment for everyone during the movie is to notice what is Archetypal about them: what are the Archetypal structures? what were the Archetypal gestures or offers made? or the choices or decisions?

     

    Watch at least 10 Archetypal Movies.

     

    Some examples of Archetypal Movies: Wonder Woman, Guardians of the Galaxy, My Dinner With Andre, Don Juan Marco, Meetings With Remarkable Men, Lord of the Rings.

     

    Find more at: https://possibilityfilms.mystrikingly.com

     

    When you have watched 10 movies, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.10 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 10 Matrix Points.

    NOTICE THE ARCHETYPAL STRUCTURES

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.11

    For the next 3 months, the experiment is to build your muscle of attention for Archetypal structure, especially physical archetypal structure, both built by Human or by Nature.

     

    Reserve a few pages at the back of your Beep!Book, and title it: ARCHETYPAL STRUCTURE. Draw each Archetypal structure that you find in your Beep!Book. Write down next to your drawing your experience of them and being around them. What makes a statue or structure an Archetypal structure?

     

    For example, notice the archetypal structures of a Temple, of a street, of a symbol, sculpture, rocks, caves, terraces...

     

    After 3 months of filling the pages in your Beep! Book, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.11 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

    FIND ONE ARTIFACT OF YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.12

    Your next experiment is to go find one artifact of your Archetypal Lineage. Let your Archetypal Lineage guide you into craft markets, or shops, or the woods. Let it guide your hands to pick the object. Pay whatever it costs. It might well be a rusty old piece of metal.

     

    Then, for a whole week, carry the artifact with you wherever you go. If someone asks you about the artifacts, tell them it is an artifact of your Archetypal Lineage.

     

    At the end of the week, write for at least 10 minutes in your Beep! Book about what you noticed, what happened.

     

    Then enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.12 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    BUILD AN ALTAR TO YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.13

    Build an altar to your Archetypal Lineage in your work space.
    Keep it alive and clean.

     

    One you have done this for at least a month, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.13 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point. You can continue for the rest of your life.

    WRITE A POEM TO THE NATURE OF YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.14

    Write a one-page long poem to the Possibility of your Archetypal Lineage (1 matrix point). The poem brags about the legendary nature of your Archetypal Lineage. The nature of your Archetypal Lineage in so many ways cannot be captured in words. Words are small. Poetry is an art that allows you to get closer to the radiant multi-dimensionality of your Archetypal Lineage.

     

    Publish the poem (1 matrix point), on your website and Medium.

     

    Then, the same or next day, go downtown in your village, city or community and sing your poem with no particular melody ten times over in your full voice (1 matrix point). Bring the page with you, this experiment is not about memorizing the poem.

     

    The experiment is to sing the poem so that your nervous system can come more in resonance with your Archetypal Lineage in a bold way.

     

    When you have done these three steps, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.14 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

    LISTEN TO YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.15

    You were born with your Archetypal Lineage. Your Archetypal Lineage has been communication with you ever since. In many ways, you are already serving your Archetypal Linage, probably mainly unaware of when, how and with whom.

    This experiment is to start opening the channel to hear the instructions your Archetypal Lineage is given you. This channel is often buried under your continuous emotional banter. Part of the ongoing experiment to get closer to your Archetypal Lineage is to go through regular Emotional Healing Processes.

     

    The experiment is to go for one hour walk outside on the streets (not in the forest). During that hour, listen to your Archetypal Lineage giving you instructions such as: "Move now," "Go left," "Go into this shop," "Talk to the owner," "stop," "Look up" ... The difference between the orders from your mind and the instructions from your Archetypal Lineage is experiential. Build the muscle to notice the difference of experience between your mind and your Archetypal Lineage speaking to you.

     

    Bonus 1: When you get an instruction to "Talk to this person" have a conversation with them to find out what is their Archetypal Lineage.

     

    Bonus 2: Ask them the question, "What are you doing that is bringing healing for the world?"

     

    When you have done them, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.15 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This whole Experiment, with all the parts, is worth 3 Matrix Points.

     

    WHAT IS YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE? PROVE IT.

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.16

    Bring this experiment to your Possibility Team. Set the context for the participants to guess each other's Archetypal Lineage by reading this website out loud together.

     

    The first part of this experiment happens in the big circle. Each person after the next ask the whole group: "Please tell me what my Archetypal Lineage is. What is it about?" and have people tell them freely what their Archetypal Lineage is. Have one person write down what is being said in the Beep! Book of who is being scanned. Give 6 minutes per Archetypal Lineage.

     

    Hint: There is not right or wrong answer. Each person will have a different perspective on each person's Archetypal Lineage. Tell the people in your Team this is a 'Yes and...' space.

     

    For the second part of the this experiment, break your Possibility Team in group of 3 people. One person starts by saying what their Archetypal Lineage and giving example of when they were their Archetypal Lineage in action. Each person gets about 8 minutes.

     

    Bonus part: After the second part is done, go back to the first person. They now have to prove the skills and competence of their Archetypal Lineage right now right there. The person has 10 minutes to deliver the service of the Archetypal Lineage to their two partners in the group of 3.

     

    When each person has done these three steps, they can enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.16 in their free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points for each person.

    DESIGN, MAKE, AND WEAR YOUR ARCHETYPAL OUTFIT

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.17

    Design your Archetypal Lineage outfit - including weapons.

    Make your Archetypal Lineage outfit.

    Wear your Archetypal Lineage outfit - for at least a month.

     

    When you have done these three steps, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.17 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

    DESIGN AND DELIVER YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE SIGNATURE MOVE FOR A YEAR

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.18

    Design the Signature Move for your Archetypal Lineage. The requirement are that your Signature Move should be at least 3 seconds long and that it cannot be something that already exists.

     

    Deliver it once a day for a year.

     

    When the year has passed, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.14 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

    BUY FOREIGN FOODS AND EAT THEM

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.19

    Being your Archetypal Lineage in action requires that you become bigger than your Box. You have a Box. You are not your Box. Expanding your life experiences, your Being and your Box all at the same time, are necessary for you to become 'big' enough to be a space for your Archetypal Lineage to take action.

     

    The food you eat is Box-oriented. This experiment is to expand your Box that wherever your Archetypal Lineage takes you, you can eat the food offered.

     

    Therefore, the experiment is to go to a foreign grocery store. Choose one that you have never been before. Go to Chinatown, enter the weirdest shop and wander around. Let you hand pick out three things you've never eaten before.

     

    When you go home, eat those three things together or separately.

     

    When you have done these three steps, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.19 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    GET THREE HERBS FOR YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.20

    We are animals. We used to live in Nature. We used to have a connection with Gaia. The Earth around us used to grow the herbs that our bodies needed. This is true.

     

    Most of us don't have a garden or land around that we are connected to enough for this to happen. However, your bodies need herbs.

     

    Go to a herbal shop with the purpose of choosing three herbs for your Archetypal Lineage. Let your hand pick out three herbs. Tell the herbalist: "I need these three herbs. What they are for?" Ask the herbalist how to take them.

     

    Buy enough for these herbs treatment to be efficient. Follow the herbalist's instructions.

     

    Or create and use one or more of the Remedies in the Possibilica Cookbook.

     

    When you have done these steps, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.20 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

    ASK THE EARTH FOR YOUR NEXT STEPS TO PREPARE YOURSELF TO JACK INTO YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.21

    The Earth is an immense resource for your authentic questions. An authentic question is for example: 'Please take me to someone who could help me with the following question: what are my next steps to prepare myself to jack into my Archetypal Lineage?'

     

    Go to https://journeyintotheearth.mystrikingly.com/, and follow the instructions of the Journey Into The Earth process. Take the above question to the guardian.

     

    Make sure to write down the instructions given to you by Earth into your Beep! Book. Follow the instructions.

     

    When you have done this journey, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.14 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    CALL AN INITIATOR AND ASK FOR YOUR NEXT STEPS

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.22

    Go to the Initiations.org website.

     

    Choose one of the Initiators listed there.

     

    Arrange a call with them (or even better, call them up!) and ask them for specific next steps in your preparation to jack into your Archetypal Lineage.

     

    When you have your next steps, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.14 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

     

    Then do the steps.

    BANISH THE AMERICA MANTRA 'UM' FOREVER

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.23

    Banish yourself from using the American Zombie Mantra 'Um'. The instant you say 'Um,' you are pulled back by the force of the ordinary and the normal to a state of Zombiism, in which your Archetypal Lineage has no chance to come through.

     

    Along with 'um,' you can banish the 'I know' torpedo that you use to kill something coming from outside that would have changed you, AND the 'I don't know' torpedo that kill anything coming from inside of you that would have changed you.

     

    If you refuse to say 'um,' or 'I don't know', the words from your Archetypal Lineage have a chance to come through.

     

    Complex creatures as we are, we never stop something until it is too painful to keep doing it. Therefore, the challenge is that every time you say 'um' or 'I don't know', you put 10 euros into your ArchiarchY Kiva  account to loan to others.

     

    When you have done this experiment long enough that you are no longer giving to Kiva for this reason, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.23 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points. Now find another experiment to prompt you to keep giving loans to Kiva.

    BE A 'YES' TO YOUR NEXT PREPARATORY EXPERIMENTS

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.24

    For the next 3 months, your job is to be a 'Yes' to the experimental doorways that your Archetypal Lineage, E.C.C.O, Gaia, and the Universe are opening for you to prepare yourself to jack in to your Archetypal Lineage.

     

    Keep scanning for your next experiment. E.C.C.O, Gaia, the Universe, your own Archetypal Lineage are vast nonlinear resources that want you to succeed on your path of Adulthood. They are constantly given you sign in the direction of Evolution. The experiment is to be, unreasonably and uncontrollably, a 'Yes' for their 'Yes' for you.

     

    For example, if you are attracted to a workshop for the Silva Mind Control, say 'Yes', and register for it before your mind can find the many reasons not to do it.

     

    After three month, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.24 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

    HAVE YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE INTERVIEWED

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.25

    Find five people who are holding space for a podcast who regularly interview Edgeworkers. Hint: some of those people are listed at Next Culture Radio.

     

    Contact them with the purpose that they agree to interview your Archetypal Lineage in their podcast. Keep asking until an interview is booked.

     

    During the interview, remember, you are not the one being interviewed, your Archetypal Lineage is. Therefore, your job is only to open your mouth, get out of the way and let your Archetypal Lineage take over. And Have High-Level Fun the whole time!

     

    Then, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.25 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    HOST AN ARCHETYPAL DINNER

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.26

    This next experiment is for you to host a formal Archetypal Dinner with 6 people minimum.

     

    Ask each guest to wear their Archetypal Lineage's Outfit.

    The dinner has a beginning time and an end time.

    No alcohol. No drugs. No animal flesh.

    Prepare the space for a formal dinner with the most magical people there is to dine with.

    Make Archetypal Gestures. Offer others to make Archetypal Gestures.

    Treat each other as Kings and Queens.

     

    When the dinner has happened, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.26 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

    FREE THE ENERGY BLOCKING YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.27

    ​Arrange for a series of Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) to locate and release your Energetic Blocks which are associated with you expanding beyond the limitations of your Box and becoming your Archetypal Lineage in action.

     

    Ask the Spaceholders to free the energy blocking you from your Archetypal Lineage.

     

    Then enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.27 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    CREATE AN ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE DANCE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.28

    Create Archetypal Lineage choreography that lasts at least 5 minutes, and invites others to your Archetypal Lineage through your 5-body movements.

     

    Deliver your dance in a work-talk, a workshop, a Trainer Path Gathering, etc...

     

    When you have done this at least once, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.28 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    BECOME AN EARTH GUARDIAN

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.29

    Your unique Archetypal Lineage has resonance with one of the four categories of Archetypal Lineages: Earth Guardian, Gameworld Builder, Evolutionary or Village Weaver. Each category of Archetypal Lineages hold space for different jobs that need to happen in the Village (your Village can be your Team, your Community, your Possibility Team, your Family).

     

    To discover in which category of Archetypal Lineages your unique Archetypal Lineage belongs to, your experiment is to move yourself as one of the members of each of the four categories for one month at a time.

     

    This is a four months long experiment. During each of these four months, take notes in your Beep! Book about what you notice. Where does your Archetypal Lineage comes alive? For this first part of the experiment, the question is, "How is it to look at a gameworld from the perspective of the Earth Guardian category of Archetypal Lineage?" 

     

    You will need those notes for ARCHLINE.35.

     

    The first month, declare that you are an Earth Guardian. Earth Guardian have evolved from the Maori traditions of kaitiakitanga which means responsible trusteeship, hospitality, guardianship, protection, or preservation. An Earth Guardian is a guardian serving the big picture rather than personal, governmental, religious, or corporate interests.

     

    On a practical level, an Earth Guardian is a spaceholder for the integrity, continuity, togetherness of the gameworld it serves. You care for the structures, and infrastructures of the gameworld. You welcome people in and out of the gameworld. You insure that the rules of engagement of the gameworld are followed for the health and safety of the gameworld.

     

    Read more at:

    https://earthguardian.mystrikingly.com/ 

     

    After the month of moving as an Earth Guardian, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.29 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

     

    BECOME A GAMEWORLD BUILDER

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.30

    During the second month of this four months long experiment, you move out as one of the members of Earth Guardian and move into the identity of being a Gameworld Builder for your Village (your Village being your Team, your Community, your Possibility Team, your Family).

     

    Being a Gameworld Builder is being a visionary, meaning you hold the purpose (why? where? how?) of the gameworld. You scan and move the gameworld beyond its settled comfort zone into its next evolutionary step. You sense where is the gameworld not working, where could it work better as well as whose job need to be created, empowered, moved somewhere else.

     

    Read more at: https://gameworldbuilder.mystrikingly.com/.

     

    During this four months long experiment, take notes in your Beep! Book about what you notice. Where does your Archetypal Lineage come alive? How is it to look at a gameworld from the perspective of the Gameworld Builder category of Archetypal Lineage? You will need those notes for ARCHLINE.35.

     

    After one month of moving as a Gameworld Builder, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.30 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

    BECOME AN EVOLUTIONARY

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.31

    During the third month of this four months long experiment, you take yourself out of the Gameworld Builders Lineage and move into the category of Archetypal Lineage of the Evolutionaries in service of your Village (your Village being your Team, your Community, your Possibility Team, your Family).

     

    Evolutionaries facilitate context-shift for greater consciousness and presence in communities, businesses, next cultures, and learning environments centered on authentic adulthood initiatory processes. As an Evolutionary, you take individual people through their next Emotional Healing Process. You hold Wisdom Council, Frying Pan, Wok Process for the Village as a whole.

     

    During this four months long experiment, take notes in your Beep! Book about what you notice. Where does your Archetypal Lineage comes alive? How is it to look at a gameworld from the perspective of the Evolutionaries category of Archetypal Lineage? You will need those notes for ARCHLINE.35.

     

    After one month of moving as an Evolutionary, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.31 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

    BECOME A VILLAGE WEAVER

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.32

    For the fourth month of this experiment, you become a Village Weaver. During this four month experiment, organize for yourself a small ritual on the day of the shift of category of Archetypal Lineage. Declare that you are conscious leaving the jobs and care of one category and taking on the jobs and care of another category of Archetypal Lineage.

     

    The Village Weaver sniffs out discord and moves by instinct to weave the social fabric of interdependence in the village culture.

     

    One of the most common ways for a village project to fall apart is the unwillingness to confront our personal habits of separation. This is the Village Weaver's job, to notice when someone is casting themselves out, when someone feels disconnected, or there is a conflict.

     

    During this four months long experiment, take notes in your Beep! Book about what you notice. Where does your Archetypal Lineage comes alive? How is it to look at a gameworld from the perspective of the Village Weaver category of Archetypal Lineage? You will need those notes for ARCHLINE.35.

     

    After one month of moving as aVillage Weaver, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.32 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

    OBTAIN AND WEAR AN ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE TALISMAN

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.33

    In a number of Possibility Labs, the Trainers will create a space for you to choose your Archetypal Lineage Talisman among the ones presented.

    Before the Possibility Lab starts, you can request the Trainers to create that space. 

     

    Once you have found your Archetypal Lineage Talisman, wear it. Everyday. Probably not during the night if you want to sleep. Probably not under the shower. If you are not wearing it everyday, probably you are not ready for your Archetypal Lineage Talisman or the one you choose is not yours.

     

    Wearing your Archetypal Lineage Talisman is a practice.

    The Talisman is NOT jewelry. It is a Doorway.
    Wearing your Archetypal Lineage Talisman is saying 'Hello' to your Archetypal Lineage and sending it the message that you are preparing yourself to jack-in.

     

    After wearing an Archetypal Lineage Talisman for one year, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.33 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    SHARE THE VICTORIES OF YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.34

    This experiment can be done during a Possibility Team whether online or offline. It can be done with friends and colleague around a home baked cake and a cup of tea. This Experiment is to learn the skills of Conscious Legend Making.

     

    Set up a space of enough listening for you to share the victories of your Archetypal Lineage with the people who are in the space. This can be done in a practice of conscious bragging, AND this is only one option. For example, sharing the victories of your Archetypal Lineage can be told through story-telling.

     

    It is part of the tradition of Sorceresses and Wyzards in Possibility Management, that we gather a few times a year to tell the legends of our Archetypal Lineage in your training spaces.

     

    After holding space for this space of listening and sharing, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.34 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    WRITE ABOUT THE SECRET TEACHINGS OF YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.35

    Your next job to prepare yourself to jack into your Archetypal Lineage is to write an article about the Secret Teachings of your Archetypal Lineage.

     

    The way to write an article is to first commit to writing the article no matter what happens, no matter the fear, no matter the blank page, no matter your Gremlin taking off track. You commit to writing it by a certain date. This means every time you talk to someone, you tell them that you are writing this article by the certain date.

     

    The article must be at least 3 pages long. It can easily be called: 'The Secret Teachings of My Archetypal Lineage.'

     

    When it's done, last but not least, publish the article on your website and on Medium (or other platforms that you can find on Write Your Article website).

     

    When your article is published, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.35 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    DO A VISION FAST

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.36

    Prepare yourself to engage 11-day Vision Fast for Adults with the School of Lost Borders with the purpose to let go of the things that you think are important that are distracting you from doing what you came here to do. Do the full 11 day process.

     

    Then enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.36 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

    FIND THE NAME OF YOUR SERVICE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.37

    Get your Beep! Book and pen.

    Sit across from somehow. Ask them to become a space for Possibility Listening.

    Tell them you are finding the name of your Archetypal Lineage and you need a work bench for research.

    Connect to your Service and start saying possible names. Just start even if nothing comes. It could be as simple as ‘Warrior.' Say it out loud. Then ask your Service: ‘Okay, what kind of Warrior?’ You need a qualifier.

    Keep saying the qualifiers and nouns. Keep writing them down one under the other.

    The person sitting across from you might have some proposals, or questions. And don’t let them interfere.

    You might have to write 15, 20, 30 names until you close the space. When you have a solid selection:

    Either one name might hit you, and you will know that’s the one (for now).

    Or you need to just pick one and try it out for a while, a few weeks.

    The name of your Service is a draft, it might stay a draft. It might change while you keep going through your initiation. There is nothing wrong about that.

     

    When you have had and used the name of your service for three months, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.37 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    WHATEVER YOU DO, DO IT CONSCIOUSLY AS A SERVICE FROM YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.38

    Yes, you are doing what you do for very good reasons. For example, to make your boss happy, make your clients happy, to make your husband happy, to make money, to stay healthy, to make your kids happy, to make your parents happy, etc...

     

    In this experiment, forget all those reasons. Start over as if it was a new day, a new life time. Make sure you have your Center, Grounding Cord and Bubble, and be the space through which your Archetypal Lineage can do some kind of work in this particular specific case - whatever you are working on.

     

    How will you know if it is working? You can tell it is working if you get different feedback, if people speak with you differently, or relate with you differently. If what you are creating comes from a different source than practical necessity with good reasons, then you will notice a different quality of consequences.

     

    Please start a new page in your Beep! Book titled ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE RESULTS and list in detail whatever surprises you or other people with delight and unexpectedness.

     

    Collect notes until you have 2 full pages.

     

    Then share your notes from this experiment at your next Possibility Team.

     

    Then, enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.38 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    JACKING INTO YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

    Matrix Code ARCHLINE.39

    Jacking into your Archetypal Lineage is - evidently - an Archetypal Initiatory Process that requires that you have been through the pre-requisites and have done ALL the experiments above so that you have built enough matrix to hold the powerfully life-collapsing initiation.

     

    Jacking Into Your Archetypal Lineage is giving your Life to your Archetypal Lineage - meaning where you live (country, house, ...), who are your collaborators, who you need to talk to, who you need to speak to, ... Your Box will freak out, and your Gremlin will freak out. So what? If you have dis-identify yourself from your Box, then let your Box freak out, let your Gremlin freak out. You will have release your survival commitment to them. You will create a new commitment to what your Archetypal Lineage needs to say, move and create.

     

    It takes time to build the matrix to Jack Into Your Archetypal Lineage.

     

    At the same time, the transformational experiments and distinctions in the StartOver.xyz game, participating in Expand The Box Training and 10 Labs are designed for you to jack-in to your Archetypal Lineage (and parallely, to build your own Nanonation).

     

    When you have done ALL the experiments and prerequisites above, then check-in with one of the Possibility Lab Trainer about the possibility of going through the initiation of jacking Into Your Archetypal Lineage. If the Possibility Management Trainer gives you more prerequisites, then you know what to do!

     

    After you have been through the Initiation of Jacking Into Your Archetypal Lineage, please enter Matrix Code ARCHLINE.39 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Point.

  • A Story About Jacking-In

    from Anne-Chloé Destremau

    Before I encountered the possibility of adulthood and archetypal initiatory processes, I was mostly a strange human being with too many considerations and questions for my friends and loved ones. I had learned to mostly be quieter than I really wanted to be. Unconsciously, I had figured out that I could be a little louder, and little crazier when I and my friends would be drinking alcohol. My presence and behaviors would then go unnoticed.

     

    Before long, I went on the road to finally meet the possibility of growing up. What I discovered was beyond my expectations of what a human being is really. My guess is that I am still at the beginning of this journey, and my human soul is still mostly uncharted territory. That, I am glad about, it gives me something to do for the rest of my life.

     

    But I digress... At the beginning of this journey, I met a Man. I capitalize Man for a reason. He had learned, through dying many many times, the possibility and the value of Being Nothing in the presence of a Woman. This time, me. It was the first time that my Everythingness was held, seen and most of all, welcomed. Not being naive, I didn't let my guard down so easily. He had to work to gain access to the source. And he did. We would go to cafes, and restaurants, he would sit there with his book open, a pen in his hand, ready to fire question in my direction to access the Source.

     

    These were the best times. Experiencing oneself being jacked-in into a source, The Source is by far one of the most exhilarating adventure that I found. We filled up pages and pages of multiple Beep Books with ideas, distinctions, maps, processes, adventures...

     

    Ahead of me, the Man became quickly unsatisfied that those jewels were stuck on a piece of paper unavailable to the world. He wanted to share them with the world. But I didn't care! I just wanted to be The Source again and again. Back then, I thought I could not access it without him holding an empty space for the source to speak into. When this stopped, I went through six months of deep liquid states, not really knowing what to do with myself. I was back to being left to my own devices.

     

    Slowly, I took his advice and started writing articles, blog post and poems. It was pretty painful and not getting even close to the ecstasy of having my Feminine Universe pulled out of me by the polarity of his Masculine necessity.

     

    I had heard of the process of Jacking-in to my Archetypal Lineage. First, I rejected the idea outright. For starters, I didn't believe that I had any contact with my Archetypal Lineage, not being able to write or speak without an avid listener. It all seemed to be very esoteric and wishful thinking.

     

    A few weeks before we planned to depart on a four-month writing retreat (I can let you imagine how exciting that sounded to me at the time), I blurted out: "I think it is time that I jack-in to my Archetypal Lineage". I had no idea where my change of mind came from, and I had enough experience in mind-changing that I did not question it. What was the point?

     

    So I did. I jacked-in to my Archetypal Lineage surrounded by a circle of 20 plus edgeworkers who had been working their butts-off for four days to expand their consciousness in my presence during a Possibility Lab in Mallorca. Nothing I can really tell you can prepare you for this experience.

     

    In my case, I felt immensely supported and loved, completely carried by a new and somehow archetypally empowered tribe.

     

    I guess I expected to be different the next day. I expected feeling more awakened, or experiencing some sort of electricity through my body. I definitely expected something to be different. Well... it wasn't.

     

    I am not saying that it is like that for everybody. I have heard so many different stories about initiatory processes that it is not realistic to make any rules about how it goes.

     

    However, about one month later I suddenly noticed myself start to speak before any of my colleagues in a group had a chance to even think about what they were going to say. I would look at participants and speak into the space even before anyone asked questions. Things just had to come out of my mouth.

     

    I could speak powerfully for minutes on end, for hours straight, without tiring or being afraid that I was bothering anybody. If they didn't want to listen to what was being said, they could go somewhere else, or hang up the phone. I wasn't going to shut up.

     

    The biggest shift happened one morning. A man and I were creating ideas and processes together, each one empowered by finer and finer Distinctions. Accompanying this creation, came anger. It wal telling me: "What is the point of us having all those cool ideas, if no one is going to use them to create something different in their lives for themselves and for others?!? This creation is pointless if only WE get to have ecstasy but not other people. These things we are discovering are not for us. There are so many. We cannot even make use of what we already have."

     

    In that moment I realized that I didn't need anybody else's help to access The Source (AKA: among other things, my Archetypal Lineage). I could now do that on my own.

     

    I also realized that the driving force in me gaining access to the Source is for me to freely share the Treasures as widely and as quickly as I can. Keeping the ecstasy and the discoveries for myself is no longer part of the deal.

    by Anne-Chloé Destremau

  • StartOver.xyz

    NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code ARCHLINE.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!
